prompt: A photorealistic, casual top-down snapshot of an open lined notebook resting on a textured gray fabric surface. The notebook pages are filled with {argument name="handwriting style" default="neat, legible Korean handwriting"}. The right page is the main focus, starting with the date "{argument name="date" default="2024 10월 18일 금요일"}" at the top left and a printed "Date." at the top right. Below the date is a small hand-drawn sun icon next to the text "{argument name="weather" default="날씨: 맑음"}". The rest of the page contains about 14 lines of handwritten text detailing {argument name="content topic" default="a student's daily diary entry about going to academies, taking tests, eating kimchi jjigae, and studying"}. The left page is partially visible, also containing handwritten Korean text. The lighting is natural and soft, giving the impression of a personal, everyday photograph.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真、随意的俯拍快照，展示了一本放在有纹理的灰色织物表面上的横线笔记本。笔记本页面上写满了 {argument name="handwriting style" default="整洁、清晰的韩语手写体"}。右侧页面是焦点，左上角写着日期 "{argument name="date" default="2024 年 10 月 18 日 星期五"}"，右上角印有 "Date." 字样。日期下方有一个手绘的小太阳图标，旁边写着 "{argument name="weather" default="天气：晴"}"。页面其余部分包含约 14 行手写文字，详细描述了 {argument name="content topic" default="一名学生关于去补习班、参加考试、吃泡菜汤和学习的日常日记"}。左侧页面部分可见，也包含手写韩语文字。光线自然柔和，营造出一种个人日常照片的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 手写韩语日记：生成一张照片级逼真的图像，展示一本放在织物表面上、带有手写韩语日记内容的横线笔记本。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 城市美食地图、活动导览、园区地图、旅行视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: top-down]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
